briefdescription.para: Variable to choose which floor detection algorithm to run.
Result status of RANSAC floor detection If the status is true then RANSAC result can be considered, otherwise, run the Threshold Y based floor detection.
Rotation around X axis in radian.
Rotation around Y axis in radian.
Rotation around Z axis in radian.
Flag for camera rotation.
distance (25mm) which determines how close the point must be to the RANSAC plane in order to be selected as inlier.
Maximum number of RANSAC iterations (10) which is allowed.
Small offset value used in filtering point cloud based on depth (Z)
Threshold to filter the point cloud based on depth (Z) Select the points with depth value lesser than 1500mm from the sensor (safety bubble radius 1.0m + delta 0.5m)
Camera height, default is 0.1524m (6 inches)
Points which are lower than ground.
Number of iterations RANSAC has taken for floor detection.
Time (ms) RANSAC has taken for floor detection.
Enable painting the floor pixels in output image for visulation of the floor.
Floor height with offset for Threshold Y based floor detection.
This is the scale factor to scale the input image. The processing will happen on the scaled down image The topics and the output coordinates will correspond to the scaled image size.
ROI details after transformation.
Construct a new ADI3DToFSafetyBubbleDetector object.
Destroy the ADI3DToFSafetyBubbleDetector object.

new values from dynamic reconfigure are copied to a struture variable here, actual update to individual parameters happens in updateDynamicReconfigureVariablesInputThread and updateDynamicReconfigureVariablesProcessThread functions.
updates the parameter of input image based on dynamic reconfigure.

memberdef.argsstring: (cv::Mat img, const std::string &encoding_type, std::string frame_id, const rclcpp::Publisher< sensor_msgs::msg::Image >::SharedPtr publisher)
memberdef.name: publishImageAsRosMsg

memberdef.name: publishCompressedImageAsRosMsg

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned short *depth_frame, unsigned short *ab_frame, unsigned short *vcam_depth_frame, short *xyz_frame)
memberdef.name: publishImageAndCameraInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *compressed_depth_frame, int compressed_depth_frame_size, unsigned char *compressed_ab_frame, int compressed_ab_frame_size)
memberdef.name: publishImageAndCameraInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *compressed_img, int compressed_img_size, const std::string &encoding_type, std::string frame_id, const rclcpp::Publisher< sensor_msgs::msg::CompressedImage >::SharedPtr publisher)
memberdef.name: publishRVLCompressedImageAsRosMsg

briefdescription.para: populates virual view camera intrinsics
This is main class for this package.
